summary:
A row of houses each hold a certain amount of money, given in nums. A security system will trigger if you rob two directly neighboring houses on the same night.

Return the largest total amount of money you can collect without ever robbing two adjacent houses.

examples.explanation: Rob houses 0 and 2 (1 + 3 = 4); they are not adjacent.

constraints: No two robbed houses may be next to each other in the row
